summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zeuer e-commerce platform rebrand. All backend APIs (12/12) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Brand colors successfully changed from red to Electric Blue/Cyan, DM Sans font implemented, glassmorphism cards added, blue neon glow effects working. No functionality broken by rebrand.
passed_tests: Auth Register with new test user
Cart add with product_id=irapuato-retro, size=M, quantity=1
Frontend homepage hero loads with blue glow logo
Frontend product cards display with glassmorphism styling
Frontend login page loads with glassmorphism form
Frontend product detail page loads with blue background and size selectors
Frontend admin panel accessible after admin login
Frontend shop page loads with category filters
